programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 1
programme.desc: Following a football team in the highlands of Ireland made of members of the same family who speak a language that none of their opponents understand.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 2
programme.desc: In Copsa Mica, the pollution created by industrial activity has impacted the health of the local team and forced them to transplant a football pitch from a nearby village.

programme.title: The Muddy Roots of Football - Part 3
programme.desc: With a cemetery behind one of the goals, this is where players of Vilar de Barrio play. The clay pitch is described as the 'worst in Spain' and the coach is running for mayor.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Across generations, people have flocked to this Atlantic Coast city to follow their dreams; farmworkers from south Georgia arrived here in search of jobs as longshoremen; immigrants from Lebanon came in search of religious and economic freedom.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: A limited series on Southern food and culture. John T. Edge writes and hosts the show and is executive produced by Wright Thompson; Season Five revolves around two food stories told from one place and sets in the conversation to make larger points about Southern beliefs and identities.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 14 Cavaliers eye an eighth straight win as they host the Demon Deacons. Virginia ended a five-game series slide with a win last year, its first over Wake Forest since 2007. Demond Claiborne (WAKE) topped 100 yards from scrimmage with two TDs.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 19 Cavaliers (8-2, 5-1) try to maintain their recent mastery of the Blue Devils (5-4, 4-1) in a clash of ACC contenders. Virginia has won eight of the last nine meetings. UVA comes off a 16-9 upset loss at home against Wake Forest.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Hokies face the No. 18 Cavaliers in the Commonwealth Clash series. Virginia Tech is 23-2 versus rival Virginia on the gridiron since 1999. UVA will play in the ACC title game with a win, or with combined losses from SMU, NC State and Syracuse.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Narvaez welcomes the crew into his world, which revolves around Baseline Road, the Camino Real of Little Rock; he and his brother Raul Narvaez own four businesses in town, including El Super Pollo, a western wear store and two grocery stores.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: The crew joins their guide Caleb Johnson at the onetime center of the Alabama coal mining industry as they document the legacies of that hard work; Johnson has plenty of familiarity with the area as grew up in the nearby town of Arley.

programme.title: Live: Athletes Unlimited Softball League
programme.desc: From Tom Heath Field in Oklahoma City, Okla.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Singleton grew up in Greenwood, S.C. and now lives on the outskirts of Spartanburg with his partner Glenda Guion, a ceramicist; they make their living as artists, working in side-by-side backyard sheds, accompanied by their dog, Cleo.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: John T. Edge travels around the region, introducing viewers to Southern tastemakers, food, culture and history.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 17 Cavaliers (10-2) and Blue Devils (7-5) compete for the ACC championship. Virginia defeated Duke 34-17 in November. Cavaliers senior J'Mari Taylor has rushed for 14 touchdowns. Blue Devils sophomore Darian Mensah boasts 28 touchdown passes.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 19 Cavaliers try to bounce back against the Tigers in the Gator Bowl. Virginia missed its chance at a College Football Playoff berth with an overtime loss to Duke in the ACC title game. Missouri won the only previous meeting, 31-7 in 1973.

programme.title: ACC Huddle
programme.desc: ACC Huddle, ACCN's signature football show, airs on Saturday mornings this fall. Host Kelsey Riggs and analysts Eric Mac Lain, EJ Manuel, Mark Richt, and Eddie Royal go on the road to preview the weekend's slate of ACC football games.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Commodores visit the Hokies. Vanderbilt stopped a five-game series slide with a 34-27 victory last season on Diego Pavia's four-yard run in overtime. Vanderbilt beat FCS member Charleston Southern 45-3 on Aug. 30 behind Pavia's three TD passes.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Commodores clash with the No. 11 Gamecocks in an SEC opener for both schools. South Carolina has picked up a win over Vanderbilt in 16 straight seasons after a 28-7 verdict in 2024. Diego Pavia has 25 TD passes in 15 career games at Vanderbilt.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Panthers play the red-hot No. 20 Commodores. Vanderbilt is 3-0 for the first time since 2017 after thrashing then-No. 11 South Carolina 31-7 on Sept. 13. Georgia State stunned Vanderbilt with a late touchdown to win 36-32 in 2024.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Join host Roger Raglin for one exciting whitetail adventure after another. Roger Raglin Outdoors features all big game but is predominantly whitetail hunting utilizing a variety of hunting methods: bow, rifle and black powder. As a true outdoorsman and an exceptional big game hunter, Roger shares a lifetime of tricks and techniques to help you in your quest for big game.

programme.title: Bowhunter TV
programme.desc: Danny Farris joins Curt Wells on the open plains of Colorado for a challenging pronghorn hunt. With little cover and sharp eyes everywhere, Danny makes a careful stalk right up to a buck to take the shot.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Batten Down October.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: The Keefer Brothers give an inside look at how "Dropped" came to be.

programme.title: Hornady's Dark and Dangerous
programme.desc: Hornady's Dark & Dangerous is a bold series that documents the highs, lows, harsh realities and tangible risks always present on a fair chase, dangerous game safari into wild Africa. This features Africa's most recognized Professional Hunters who allow the Safari Classics camera crew unprecedented access into the world of real time safari adventure.

programme.title: Adrenaline
programme.desc: A Colorado Elk hunt from a fresh perspective as Kyle Wieter helps guide his close friend and first time hunter Brad Pfitzner to success.

programme.title: Trijicon's World of Sports Afield
programme.desc: Hosted by international big game hunter Dave Fulson, Trijicon's World Of Sports Afield takes the viewer around the globe in search of big game adventure. From the rugged Yukon, to the windswept mountains of North America and Asia, to the great game fields of Africa, this series delivers world-class hunting in each episode!

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Chef and the crew continue their journey in Louisiana to cook blue crabs and hunt early teal season.

programme.title: RNT-V
programme.desc: RNT-V is based around the RNT Call Shop in Stuttgart, Arkansas--from chasing ducks and geese over fine retrievers in different parts of the country to uncovering the history of an old time call maker. Hosted by World Champions who are all about the hunt!

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Award-Winning Heartland Waterfowl is a team of men from the Midwest that travels across the US and Canada to film honest waterfowl hunting experiences. With a variety of personalities, these hunting buddies pursue waterfowl hunting with hard work and a dedication to scouting, while showcasing their efforts with the highest standard of production quality.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Florida's Space Coast is a great place to catch snook and Captain Peter Deeks knows just where to find them.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Capt. Mike And Geoff put an absolute clinic in Sarasota Florida.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Champion angler Chris Lane searches his tackle box to select the appropriate bait for bass fishing.

programme.title: Wild Upland
programme.desc: Kali Parmley heads into the Colorado alpine in search of dusky grouse.

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Small Town Hunting is a show inspired by you, the viewer. The lifestyle throughout small towns everywhere has always been the roots of the hunting culture. Cody, Chris and Keith bring it back to the ground level by documenting the lifestyle of hunting in a raw, cinematic style that we call Small Town Hunting. After all, wherever you call home, there is a little small town in all of us.

programme.title: Ranch America
programme.desc: Beautiful, cool, coastal California is the setting for this cattle ranch focused on regenerative farming.

programme.title: Huntworx
programme.desc: HuntWorx is a new show based around the ideology of the three major principles that aid in consistently harvesting mature animals. This plan, prep and pursue model has stood the test of time and continues to pay dividends for our cast year in and year out. With a combined over 100 years of dedicated hunting experience, Greg Glesinger, Kasey Morgan, Matt Dye, Adam Keith, and Max Mongrello wish to n

programme.title: Hornady's Dark and Dangerous
programme.desc: Hornady's Dark & Dangerous is a bold series that documents the highs, lows, harsh realities and tangible risks always present on a fair chase, dangerous game safari into wild Africa. This features Africa's most recognized Professional Hunters who allow the Safari Classics camera crew unprecedented access into the world of real time safari adventure.

programme.title: Handguns

programme.title: Greg McHale's Wild Yukon

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures

programme.title: The Western Hunter
programme.desc: The Western Hunter documents the journeys of public land hunters out West. The stories unfold in some of the most wild and beautiful settings on the continent in pursuit of big game.

programme.title: Into High Country
programme.desc: Into High Country seeks to capture the most compelling and wide array of authentic hunting adventures from the most epic landscapes the Western U.S. and North America have to offer. programme.title: RNT-V

programme.desc: A red snapper trip to Alabama quickly turns into an unforgettable adventure as the Spear Life crew battles tough conditions, injuries, and bad luck before finally finding success beneath the surface of the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Julie Higgs Spearfishing
programme.desc: A lifelong spearfishing aficionado, Julie Higgs first discovered her passion while sailing aboard her family's sailboat in the Bahamas, where fish dinners caught by pole-spear were as much a tradition as a pastime. Now, armed with years of experience and an unquenchable thirst for adventure, Julie traverses the globe in pursuit of trophy fish and uncharted marine species-combining expert technique

programme.title: Uncharted Waters With Peter Miller
programme.desc: Peter targets the largest bluefin tuna of his life off Cape Cod, MA. Trying to best 800 pounds, he's using live bluefish and butterfish chunks for bait -- and then witnesses a feeding frenzy of giant tuna and thresher shark with Captain Damon Sacco.

programme.title: Fly Fusion
programme.desc: It's difficult to find places where the water runs cold and clear and where the human footprint is nearly non-existent; Jim, Derek and Paula helicopter into one of these places, and what they find exceeds their expectation.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Jeff Parks is in Northern Ontario at Flint Wilderness Lodge targeting big eastern brook trout.

programme.title: Wild Game Cooking With Chef Rupert
programme.desc: We visit Chef Zach Keeshig of Naagan in Owen Sound where he shows us how he prepares his smoked pigeon with magnolia and birch glaze.

programme.title: Vintage Vessels
programme.desc: Peter Breen showcases his collection of boats in his cottage showroom and takes them out on the water; featured boats include a restored 1911 Mullins and a 1929 Peterborough Launch.

programme.title: Gary Cooper's Fishing Diary
programme.desc: Al Jenkins and Mike Denski fish the surf for Chinooks out of Esperanza Inlet.
